# Kalimtu Design System (Master)

**Project:** Kalimtu - AI Transcription for Tunisian Professionals
**Last Updated:** 2026-03-19
**Generated by:** UI/UX Pro Max Skill

---

## 🎨 Brand Color System

### Primary Brand Color
- **Kalimtu Lime (Primary):** `#C1FF00`
  - Vibrant, attention-grabbing accent
  - Used for CTAs, highlights, hover states
  - High contrast against dark backgrounds
  - Represents innovation and energy

### Supporting Palette

| Color | Hex | Usage | Notes |
|-------|-----|-------|-------|
| **Dark Background** | `#0A0A0F` | Page background, cards | Deep dark for contrast |
| **Dark Card** | `#1A1A2E` | Floating cards, modals | Slightly lighter than bg |
| **Text Primary** | `#FFFFFF` | Headlines, primary text | White on dark |
| **Text Muted** | `#A0A0B8` | Secondary text, descriptions | Medium gray |
| **Border** | `#2D3748` / `#C1FF00/10` | Dividers, outlines | Dark gray or subtle lime |
| **Accent Secondary** | `#818CF8` | Secondary actions, badges | Soft indigo |
| **Success** | `#10B981` | Positive feedback, checkmarks | Emerald green |
| **Warning** | `#F59E0B` | Alerts, notices | Amber |
| **Error** | `#EF4444` | Errors, destructive actions | Red |

---

## 📚 Typography System

### Font Pairing: Tech Startup (Recommended)

```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;700&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');
```

- **Headings:** Space Grotesk (400, 500, 600, 700)
  - Modern, distinctive character
  - Tech-forward, startup vibe
  - Perfect for hero headlines and section titles

- **Body:** DM Sans (400, 500, 700)
  - Highly readable, clean
  - Excellent for paragraphs and UI text
  - Works well with vibrant lime accent

### Tailwind Config

```javascript
fontFamily: {
  display: ['Space Grotesk', 'sans-serif'],
  sans: ['DM Sans', 'sans-serif'],
}
```

### Hierarchy

| Element | Font | Size (Desktop) | Weight | Line Height | Usage |
|---------|------|----------------|--------|-------------|-------|
| **H1** | Space Grotesk | 48-56px | 700 | 1.2 | Page hero, main headline |
| **H2** | Space Grotesk | 36-42px | 600 | 1.3 | Section titles |
| **H3** | Space Grotesk | 24-28px | 600 | 1.4 | Subsection titles |
| **H4** | Space Grotesk | 18-20px | 600 | 1.5 | Card titles |
| **Body** | DM Sans | 16px | 400 | 1.6 | Paragraphs, descriptions |
| **Small** | DM Sans | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | Secondary text, captions |
| **Tiny** | DM Sans | 12px | 500 | 1.4 | Labels, badges |

### Mobile Adjustments

- H1: 32-36px
- H2: 28-32px
- H3: 20-24px
- Body: 16px (maintain)

---

## 🎭 Design Style: Cyberpunk + Professional

### Aesthetic Principles

1. **Dark Mode First**
   - All designs optimized for dark backgrounds
   - Lime acts as the energy/glow element
   - High contrast for readability

2. **Neon Highlights**
   - Lime (#C1FF00) glows on hover, focus states
   - text-shadow: `0 0 10px rgba(193, 255, 0, 0.4)` for emphasis
   - Reserved for CTAs, active states, critical interactions

3. **Glass Morphism (Secondary)**
   - Subtle glass cards: `bg-white/5` to `bg-white/10`
   - Frosted glass effect with backdrop blur
   - Borders: `border-white/10` or `border-lime/10`

4. **Motion & Interactions**
   - Smooth transitions: `duration-200` to `duration-300` ms
   - Easing: `ease-in-out` for natural feel
   - Avoid scale transforms that shift layout
   - Use `opacity` and `color` for smooth hover states

### Visual Hierarchy

1. **Highest Priority:** Lime (#C1FF00) - CTAs, primary actions
2. **High Priority:** White text, primary content
3. **Medium Priority:** Muted gray text, secondary content
4. **Low Priority:** Border/dividers, subtle accents

---

## 🖼️ Layout Patterns

### Landing Page Structure

```
1. Hero Section (Full viewport)
   - Headline + subheadline (Space Grotesk)
   - Primary CTA button (Lime background)
   - Hero image/video or animated background

2. Value Proposition
   - "Why Kalimtu?" with 3-4 key benefits
   - Icons + short text (DM Sans)
   - Lime accents on icons or bullets

3. Features/How It Works
   - Bento grid or card layout
   - Each card: Icon + title + description
   - Hover: Slight scale (1.02), lime glow optional

4. Testimonials/Social Proof
   - Cards with quote + person name/role
   - Star ratings in lime

5. Waitlist CTA Section
   - Form: Email input + submit button (lime)
   - Real-time counter (lime text)
   - Success state with checkmark icon

6. Footer
   - Links, contact info
   - Dark background, muted text
```

### Component Spacing

- **Section padding:** 80px (desktop), 40px (mobile) top/bottom
- **Card gap:** 16px to 24px
- **Padding inside cards:** 24px to 32px
- **Button padding:** 12px 24px (minimum 44px height for touch)

---

## 🎯 Component Guidelines

### Buttons

```html
<!-- Primary CTA (Lime) -->
<button class="bg-lime-400 hover:bg-lime-300 text-dark hover:text-dark
  px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors
  duration-200">
  Get Started
</button>

<!-- Secondary (Indigo) -->
<button class="bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white
  px-6 py-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-200">
  Learn More
</button>

<!-- Ghost (Lime border) -->
<button class="border border-lime-400 text-lime-400 hover:bg-lime-400/10
  px-6 py-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-200">
  Explore
</button>
```

**Rules:**
- Minimum 44x44px (touch target)
- Text always white or dark (4.5:1 contrast minimum)
- Smooth color transitions (200-300ms)
- Clear focus state with visible ring

### Cards

```html
<div class="bg-card border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6
  hover:border-lime-400/30 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-lime-400/20
  transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer">
  <!-- Content -->
</div>
```

**Rules:**
- Base: `bg-dark-card` (#1A1A2E)
- Border: `border-white/10`
- Hover: Lime glow, subtle lift
- No emoji icons — use Heroicons or Lucide

### Input Fields

```html
<input class="bg-white/5 border border-white/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-3
  text-white placeholder-white/40 focus:border-lime-400 focus:ring-1
  focus:ring-lime-400 transition-all duration-200"
  placeholder="Enter your email" />
```

**Rules:**
- Light borders, dark background
- Focus state: Lime border + ring
- Smooth transitions
- Proper label associations (for attribute)

### Icons

**Approved Sources:**
- Lucide React (preferred, already in project)
- Heroicons
- Simple Icons (for logos)

**Never use emoji icons** (❌ 🎨 🚀 ⚙️)

**Sizing:**
- UI icons: 20-24px (w-5, w-6)
- Section icons: 40-48px (w-10, w-12)
- Consistent within sections

---

## ✨ Animation & Effects

### Micro-interactions

| Interaction | Animation | Duration | Easing |
|-------------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Button hover | Color shift + subtle scale | 200ms | ease-in-out |
| Card hover | Border glow + shadow | 300ms | ease-in-out |
| Input focus | Border color + ring | 200ms | ease-out |
| CTA appear | Fade in + slide up | 400ms | ease-out |
| Checkmark | Scale + fade (on success) | 300ms | ease-out |

### Effects to Implement

1. **Lime Glow (CTAs)**
   ```css
   box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(193, 255, 0, 0.3);
   transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease;
   ```

2. **Glass Morphism (Cards)**
   ```css
   background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
   backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
   border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
   ```

3. **Smooth Transitions**
   ```css
   transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
   /* Use transform/opacity, avoid width/height */
   ```

### Animations to Avoid

- ❌ Scale transforms on hover (layout shift)
- ❌ Instant color changes (no easing)
- ❌ Animations > 500ms for micro-interactions
- ❌ Animations without `prefers-reduced-motion` respect

---

## ♿ Accessibility Standards

### WCAG AA Compliance (Minimum)

1. **Color Contrast**
   - Text on lime: Dark text only (lime is light)
   - Text on dark: White/light gray (4.5:1 ratio)
   - Test with: WebAIM Contrast Checker

2. **Focus States**
   ```css
   focus:outline-2 outline-offset-2 outline-lime-400
   ```

3. **Alt Text**
   - All images: Descriptive alt text
   - Icons: aria-label if text not present
   - Decorative: `aria-hidden="true"`

4. **Keyboard Navigation**
   - Tab order matches visual order
   - All interactive elements keyboard accessible
   - No keyboard traps

5. **Motion**
   ```css
   @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
     * { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; }
   }
   ```

6. **Semantic HTML**
   - Use `<button>` not `<div>` for actions
   - Use `<a>` for navigation
   - Form labels with `<label for="id">`

---

## 📱 Responsive Design

### Breakpoints (Tailwind)

| Name | Size | Usage |
|------|------|-------|
| **Mobile** | 375px | Small phones |
| **Tablet** | 768px | iPads, mid-size |
| **Desktop** | 1024px | Laptops |
| **Large** | 1440px | Large monitors |
| **Max** | 1920px | Ultra-wide |

### Mobile-First Approach

1. Design for 375px first
2. Stack components vertically
3. Adjust for 768px and up

### Key Mobile Rules

- Minimum 44x44px touch targets
- Font size: 16px (prevents zoom on iOS)
- Viewport meta: `width=device-width, initial-scale=1`
- No horizontal scroll
- Single column layout below 768px

---

## 🚀 Performance Guidelines

### Optimization

1. **Images**
   - Use WebP with fallback
   - Lazy loading below fold
   - Responsive srcset

2. **Animations**
   - Use `transform` and `opacity` only
   - Avoid repaints (layout changes)
   - Limit to 60fps (avoid jank)

3. **Fonts**
   - Load weights: 400, 500, 600, 700 only
   - Use font-display: swap
   - Variable fonts optional (check file size)

4. **CSS**
   - Use Tailwind utilities (already optimized)
   - Avoid `@apply` for simple utilities
   - Purge unused styles in production

---

## 📋 Pre-Delivery Checklist

- [ ] No emoji icons (use SVG only)
- [ ] All clickable elements have `cursor-pointer`
- [ ] Hover states smooth, no layout shift
- [ ] Text contrast 4.5:1 (tested)
- [ ] Focus states visible (tab through)
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected
- [ ] Responsive at 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px
- [ ] No horizontal scroll on mobile
- [ ] All images have alt text or aria-hidden
- [ ] Form inputs have associated labels
- [ ] Loading states visible (spinners/skeletons)
- [ ] Error messages clear and helpful
- [ ] Color not sole indicator (use icons + text)
- [ ] Tested in light AND dark mode
- [ ] Performance: FCP < 1.5s, LCP < 2.5s

---

## 🎬 Example: Waitlist Form Component

```tsx
"use client";

import { motion } from "framer-motion";
import { Check } from "lucide-react";

export function WaitlistForm() {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<"idle" | "loading" | "success" | "error">("idle");

  return (
    <motion.form
      onSubmit={handleSubmit}
      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
      whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
      className="flex flex-col gap-3 max-w-md"
    >
      {/* Input */}
      <input
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        className="bg-white/5 border border-white/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-3
          text-white placeholder-white/40 focus:border-lime-400
          focus:ring-1 focus:ring-lime-400 transition-all duration-200"
      />

      {/* CTA Button (Lime) */}
      <button
        type="submit"
        disabled={status === "loading"}
        className="bg-lime-400 hover:bg-lime-300 active:scale-98
          text-slate-900 font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg
          cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 disabled:opacity-50"
      >
        {status === "loading" ? "Joining..." : "Join Waitlist"}
      </button>

      {/* Success State */}
      {status === "success" && (
        <motion.div
          initial={{ scale: 0.8, opacity: 0 }}
          animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}
          className="flex gap-2 text-lime-400 font-medium"
        >
          <Check size={20} className="flex-shrink-0" />
          You're on the list!
        </motion.div>
      )}
    </motion.form>
  );
}
```
